title: Leaving your job
description: Find out about payments made to you when you leave your job, including redundancy and employment termination payments.
keywords: tax on annual leave payout, tax on long service leave, annual leave, payout tax, long service, leave taxes, leaving job, tax on long service, tax on retirement, tax  lsl, termination, unused leave, redundancy

child_links.title: Employment termination payments for employees
child_links.description: Find out why you may receive an employment termination payment (ETP), how it is taxed and which amounts to report.

child_links.title: Your ETP end of year statement and your tax return
child_links.description: What to do when you receive your income statement or payment summary for your employment termination payment (ETP).

child_links.title: How ETP components are taxed
child_links.description: Find out how tax applies to the components of your employment termination payment (ETP).

child_links.title: Genuine redundancy payments
child_links.description: Certain redundancy payments are tax-free up to a limit depending on your years of service with that employer.

child_links.title: Death benefit employment termination payments
child_links.description: A payment you receive from a person's employer after their death is a death benefit employment termination payment.
